# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/null
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 8099

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 10000
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: connection_manager
          service_bind_address:
            address: 127.0.0.1
            port_value: 10000
          stream_idle_timeout: 1s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
          - name: envoy.retry
            typed_config:
              '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.retry.v2.Retry
              retry_streams_per_host: 5
              circuit_breakers:
                - circuit_breaker:
                    '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.api.v2.route.CircuitBreaker
                    max_connections: 1000
                  filter_name: envoy.router
          connection_management:
            idempotent_by_default: true
      match:
        grpc_service: {}
  route_config:
    name: local_route
    virtual_hosts:
    - name: local_service
      domains:
      - '*'
      routes:
      - match:
          prefix: '/service1'
        route:
          cluster_name: service1
      - match:
          prefix: '/service2'
        route:
          cluster_name: service2

clusters:
  service1:
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service1
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoint:
          host_address:
            socket_address:
              address: 127.0.0.1
              port_value: 8088
    eds_cluster_config:
      hosts:
      - envoy.service.service1.svc.cluster.local:8001

  service2:
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service2
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoint:
          host_address:
            socket_address:
              address: 127.0.0.1
              port_value: 8089
    eds_cluster_config:
      hosts:
      - envoy.service.service2.svc.cluster.local:8001

statistics:
  envoy_stats_listener:
    listener:
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 10001
